author: Warren Johnson
name: Azure T4 Frontier Proxy Int5 Control
blurb: Proxy-only non-record development capture of the current 10L int5 frontier family on 1x Azure T4 with validation capped to 512 sequences. Pre-quant reached 3.1599 BPB and the final quantized roundtrip scored 3.20873382 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
